title: AuditExportBundle
description: Offline-verifiable audit export bundle produced by POST /v1/audit/exports. The signed byte sequence is JSON.stringify({ export_id, org_id, chain_head_hash, event_count, signed_at, events }) in that exact key order; the signature is a detached Ed25519 signature over those bytes, base64url-encoded without padding. Per-event integrity: hash = SHA-256(previous_hash || canonicalJSON(payload)) where canonicalJSON sorts object keys at every depth and maps null/undefined/non-finite numbers to the JSON literal null. See atlasent-api/supabase/functions/v1-audit/verify.ts for the reference verifier.

export_id.description: UUID generated at export time; appears first in the signed envelope.

chain_head_hash.description: SHA-256 hex of the last event's stored hash. '0'*64 for an empty export.

event_count.description: Length of the events array. MUST match events.length for chain_integrity_ok to hold.

signed_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of signing, frozen into the signed bytes.

events.description: Events in ascending sequence order. First event's previous_hash MUST be '0'*64.

signature.description: base64url(Ed25519(signing_key, envelope_bytes)), no padding. Empty string means the export was emitted unsigned (status='unsigned' or 'signing_failed' at export time) and will not verify.

signing_key_id.description: Optional hint: which key in /v1-signing-keys' registry signed this bundle. Verifiers try this key first, then fall through to the rest of the active set (rotation support).

payload.description: Event-specific payload. Canonicalized with sorted keys before hashing.

previous_hash.description: Prior event's hash. '0'*64 for the first event (GENESIS).
